name: Performapal Ladyange
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＥＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンタメイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>レディアンジュ
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
Once per turn, when an attack is declared involving your monster and an opponent's monster: You can discard 1 Pendulum Monster; that opponent's monster loses 1000 ATK, until the end of this turn.

[ Monster Effect ] 
You can discard this card and 1 "Performapal" monster, except "Performapal Ladyange"; draw 2 cards. If this card is in your GY and you control an "Odd-Eyes" card or "Performapal Gentrude": You can place this card in your Pendulum Zone. You can only use 1 "Performapal Ladyange" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
